arabic_text:
الله
اله
له
ه
ال
ل
ه
alt_text: Calligraphic decomposition diagram of the Arabic word 'الله' (Allah). Top-left box: the full 'الله'. To the right and below: the same word shown stripped progressively to 'الله', 'اله', 'له', 'ه'. Bottom-right box: the constituent letters 'ا ل ه' (alif, lam, ha).
notes: Pedagogical diagram showing how the divine name decomposes letter-by-letter into ا ل ہ, central to Ismaili numerological-theological lessons on the divine name.
